first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in score, structure, and substance. Both identify the same key strengths (AI-native experience, past distributed systems work) and the same critical concerns (complete lack of Python, dated systems experience, thin evidence of on-call/stakeholder management). The minor differences in wording and the slight shift in emphasis in one of the listed strengths are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's profile.
